Part 1: Reach Level 2

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range1
RewardMission Reach Level 2

Reach level 2

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 2.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 4.

Description

Captain! The enemies are getting stronger and we predict harder challenges ahead. Reach level 2 and we will show our appreciation.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 2: Reach Level 4

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 4

Reach level 4

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 4.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 6.

Description

We can see you have potential, Captain. But if you reach level 4 - we will truly know you are dedicated to your task. That is, to Flux it ... blast them all!

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 3: Reach Level 6

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 6

Reach level 6

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 6.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 9.

Description

We see some rare raw talent in you, Captain. But, can you harness your skills and use them in the correct way? We are not sure ... Prove it by reaching level 6, there is a nice reward containing Hydrogen Crystals waiting for you!

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 4: Reach Level 9

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 9

Reach level 9

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 9.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 12.

Description

Captain. While you successfully managed to complete your last task we have noticed that high level upgrades require Plasma Fluids. Finish this mission and we will transfer some to your cargo.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 5: Reach Level 12

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 12

Reach level 12

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 12.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 15.

Description

It's time to prove that you are serious about beeing on our team. To aquire the best upgrades you need Iridium. We will reward you with some if you reach level 12, are you up for the challenge?

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 6: Reach Level 15

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 15

Reach level 15

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 15.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 20.

Description

We like what we see, Captain, you show great potential! To prove you are not just another show off, please show us your dedication by reaching level 15.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 7: Reach Level 20

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 20

Reach level 20

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 20.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 25.

Description

How can we say this? You do have ... some ... skills. Really. But still, there's a lot of rookie punks out there trying to get to the top. Are you one of the few that can handle it?

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 8: Reach Level 25

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 25

Reach level 25

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 25.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 30.

Description

Alright. Captain, you're reaching the top! Now we need you to fine tune your weapon skills and manoeuvring techniques.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 9: Reach Level 30

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 30

Reach level 30

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 30.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 35.

Description

You are truly one of a kind! Only a few have shown us this kind of progress and devotion. We need your loyalty, Captain. Are you on our side?

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 10: Reach Level 35

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 35

Reach level 35

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 35.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 40.

Description

We can see you're aiming for the top, and we like it! Your powers are increasing every minute. Reach this impressive level and we will make sure you are rewarded.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 11: Reach Level 40

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 40

Reach level 40

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 40.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 45.

Description

You are outstanding captain! We never expected you to become such an excellent leader with superb fighting and decision making skills. However, we still have yet another mission.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 12: Reach Level 45

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 45

Reach level 45

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 45.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Reach Level 50.
  3. Some exact counts or destination names still come from placeholder text in the client cache, so the narrative text remains important.

Description

Who are you really Captain player? Very few has shown us these kinds of skills. But, we need to to get even more powerful. Level 45 is a big step forward to becoming one of the few true heroes.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 13: Reach Level 50

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 50

Reach level 50

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 50.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Eternal Mission.

Description

Captain, or should I say "The Emperor"? We still have a mission for you, reach level 50 and crush all resistance.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

Part 14: Eternal Mission

CategoryStory
Typelevel
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Reach Level 50

Reach level 100

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Reach level 100.

Description

You have reached the end and are now a true Astroflux space pioneer. You are truly awesome. But the Astroflux universe is always expanding. Stay tuned for more!

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
